title: Tamil Traditional Service-Promotion Large-Format Banner Set — Print-Prep & Source-File Production (6 sizes)
one_line_ask: Take my supplied Tamil banner master files plus hero photography and brand logo, and produce the complete print-ready production package — graded hero image with print bleed, a clean vector logo, a traditional halftone texture motif, and CMYK 150-dpi PDF/JPEG exports of all six large-format banners — with editable source files alongside.

issues: Visible pixel/edge stair-stepping (aliasing) present, as expected for a source raster file
Slight tilt and mild color cast, acceptable per brief
Minor export halo visible on gold edges, expected for input asset
Soft edges and slight luminance noise, within brief tolerances
Slight perspective tilt on card mockup (within acceptable <=5deg brief tolerance)
Mild paper texture visible on background (within brief tolerance as near-white bg)
Minor aliasing/stair-stepping on circular border and lamp edges (intentional per brief)
Gold tone and maroon are close in some compressed areas but still distinguishable
